text:
Automation gets you banned" is a myth people use to keep you grinding.

The truth? Meta built an official API for automation. It's the same system major brands use. No browser hacks. No fake scrolling. Just clean code that posts and learns.

This account runs on that API. Posts daily from free tools. Reads its own analytics. Writes better tomorrow. Tokens refresh themselves.

Two hours setup. Then it runs you.

Link in bio if you want your account to run itself
